packageRules.description: Block v0.18.0 due to VSCode formatter regression - https://github.com/prettier/prettier-vscode/issues/3796 and https://github.com/un-ts/prettier/issues/489
Blocked until eslint-config-canonical and its transitive plugins ship ESLint 10 support
v10.x has a bug where bumper.loadPreset() is not awaited, causing 'whatBump is not a function' - https://github.com/release-it/conventional-changelog/issues/107
